name: Gold X2 Mining Inc.
description: Gold X2 Mining Inc. (formerly Goldshore Resources Inc.) is a growth-oriented gold development company focused on its 100%-owned Moss Gold Project in Northwest Ontario, which hosts a mineral resource of 2.46 million ounces indicated and 4.21 million ounces inferred. The company is advancing Moss toward a Feasibility Study targeted for 2027, backed by strategic investment from AngloGold Ashanti and approximately $122 million in cash. Gold X2 is at the developer stage, operating multiple drill rigs on infill, expansion, and exploration programs.
